parameters.query:
INSERT INTO nitter_app.searches (full_url, host_name, search_query, filters, last_run_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (full_url) 
DO UPDATE SET last_run_at = NOW(), filters = $4, host_name = $2
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO nitter_app.tweets 
(search_id, nitter_guid, author_handle, content_html, tweet_link, published_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
ON CONFLICT (nitter_guid, search_id) DO NOTHING;
SELECT data FROM key_value_store WHERE name = 'PERSONAL_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID'

nodes.name: Get Telegram Chat ID for Error

main.node: Get Telegram Chat ID for Error
